assignments.name: Assign_Baseline_Initial_EPC_Ending_Fields
assignments.label: Assign Baseline Initial EPC Ending Fields

assignments.name: Assign_Baseline_initial_EPC_Starting_fields
assignments.label: Assign Baseline initial EPC Starting fields

assignments.name: Assign_baseline_values_to_draft_change_control_request_SP
assignments.label: Assign baseline values to draft change control request

assignments.name: Assign_Line_Items_CF_FY_Spends
assignments.label: Assign Line Items CF FY Spends

Flow.description: Subflow for the Change Control Request flow encapsulating the Baseline change screen

formulas.description: this is just a list of all the different fields that can be changed and checks whether the new and old values are the same, if any of them differ returns true if they are all the same returns false
formulas.name: flaHasChanges

Flow.label: GMS - Change Control Request Form - Baselines

fields.name: GuidanceCFHouseCounts
fields.fieldText:
Please indicate below any change to the total number of homes to be upgraded as part of your project, the total number of homes to reach EPC C and the total number of homes accessing each LCH incentive, using the 'Award Baseline Row.' 


Please indicate below any change to the total number of homes to be upgraded, the total number of homes to reach EPC C and the total number of homes accessing each LCH incentive within an already approved phase, using the 'Phase Baseline' Rows. 


Please be reminded that: 

  • You do not need to submit a Project Change Request to amend these figures for unapproved, future phases as long as the total project figures remain unchanged. 
  • A maximum of 10% of the homes included in the project are eligible for the on-gas grid low carbon heating (LCH) incentive offer.

fields.name: cfMonetary
fields.fieldText:
Please indicate below any change to your project total grant capital and A&A spend, and your co-funding capital and A&A spend using the 'Award Baseline Row.' 

 

Please indicate below any change to an approved phase's grant capital and A&A spend, and your co-funding capital and A&A spend, using the 'Phase Baseline Row.' 

 

Please be reminded that: 

  • You do not need to submit a Project Change Request to amend these figures for unapproved, future phases as long as the total project figures remain unchanged. 
  • The overall co-funding contribution must be a minimum of 50% of eligible costs, excluding any costs incurred on homes accessing the on-gas grid LCH incentive offer. 
  • Grant A&A funding must total no more than 15% of total project grant funding. 
  • Total A&A costs must total no more than 15% of total project costs. 
  • Total grant capital requested must adhere to the project cost caps. More specifically, total grant requested must equal no more than: ﻿(£15,000 x homes accessing the off-gas grid LCH offer) + (20,000 x homes accessing the on-gas grid LCH offer) + (£7,500 x remaining homes i.e. homes not accessing any LCH incentive) 
  • All costs are assumed to be inclusive of any non-recoverable VAT.

fields.name: GuidanceSPHouseCounts
fields.fieldText:
Please indicate below any change to the total number of homes to be upgraded as part of your project, the total number of homes to reach EPC C, total project energy savings and the total number of homes accessing each LCH incentive, using the 'Award Baseline Row.' 

  

Please indicate below any change to the number of homes to be upgraded, the number of homes to reach EPC C, energy savings and the number of homes accessing each LCH incentive within each Financial Year, using the ‘Year- X Baseline’ Rows. 

  

Please be reminded that: 

  • A maximum of 10% of the homes included in the project are eligible for the on-gas grid low carbon heating (LCH) incentive offer.

fields.name: displayLCHHomesBreached
fields.fieldText: Error - The number of homes that are applying for the LCH offer cannot be above 10% of the project total homes

fields.name: displayLchCoFundingValidation
fields.fieldText: Error - Co-Funding contribution not met - The level of co funding needs to be above {!flaLchCoFundingCap}

fields.name: displayGrantCapitalLchBreached
fields.fieldText: Error - Cost Cap Breached for project - Grant needs to be below {!flaGrantCapitalLchCap}

variables.description: Contains the AA values for the Award Baseline for Grant and Co funding so we can do validation on them
variables.name: varValidationAAAB

variables.description: Contains sums for the AA grant and cofunding across the sub baselines so we can do validation on them
variables.name: varValidationAASBSum
